title: Koncheswar Mahadev temple
tagline: Koncheswar Mahadev temple — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: Koncheswar Mahadev is a Shiva temple in Konch, Gaya district, Bihar, India.
overview.description: Koncheswar Mahadev is a Shiva temple in Konch, Gaya district, Bihar, India. The Shiva temple enshrining Shivalinga and dedicated to Koncheshwarnath and is made of bricks of different sizes. It has a heavy nagara (curvilinear) sikhara. Koncheswar Temple brings to mind the image of the Mahabodhi Temple at Bodh Gaya.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Konch (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Konch is a community development block of Gaya district in Bihar, India. Konch(Konch Village/Konch Panchayat/Konch Thana-Police Station) is a typical village market area slowly taking shape of a sub-urban settlement and centre of small business (mainly shops selling items such as grocery, building materials, agricultural inputs like fertilizer, seeds, small farm equipments etc.).

topPlaces.name: Moke Village
topPlaces.description: Moke Village is a village under Konch block of Bihar state, India. This village is situated near Tekari sub-division.

topPlaces.name: Tekari
topPlaces.description: Tekari is a town and a municipality in Gaya district in the Indian state of Bihar and was the centre of erstwhile Tekari Raj. Maharaja Gopalsaran was the king of this area in British times.

topPlaces.name: Alipur, Bihar
topPlaces.description: Alipur is a village in Gaya district, in the state of Bihar, in eastern India.

topPlaces.name: Sheonagar
topPlaces.description: Sheonagar is a large village 3 km south of Tekari in the Gaya district of Bihar state, India. Its population is about 5000.

topPlaces.name: Jalalpur, Tekari (census code 254808)
topPlaces.description: Jalalpur is a village in Gaya district, Bihar, India. Jalalpur Village is located in Paluhar panchayat of Tekari block.

topPlaces.name: Dariyapur, Aurangabad
topPlaces.description: Dariyapur is a village in the Aurangabad district Indian state of Bihar. It comes under Dumri panchayat, Kutumba block.

topPlaces.name: Panchanpur, Gaya
topPlaces.description: Panchanpur, Gaya, is a village in the Indian state of Bihar. It is on the state highway which connects Gaya to Tekari, 6 km from Tekari sub-divisional office and 18 km from Gaya.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koncheswar Mahadev temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koncheswar Mahadev temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koncheswar Mahadev temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gaya International Airport (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Gaya Junction (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koncheswar Mahadev temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koncheswar Mahadev temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koncheswar Mahadev temple?
faq.a: Stays in Koncheswar Mahadev temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koncheswar Mahadev temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Konch (community development block), Moke Village, Tekari, Alipur, Bihar, Sheonagar.
